Technical details.Modes: CPAP, S, S/T, PC, T, AVAPS

description_text:
Philips DreamStation BiPAP AVAPS

The Philips DreamStation BiPAP AVAPS is designed to cater the tidal volume support as per indiviadual needs. The machine has advanced features 


	
	Average Volume Assured Pressure Support (AVAPS)
	


This mode is generally recommended for COPD, Respiratory insufficiency, and Hypoventilation patients. This feature includes Digital Auto-Trak technology, which fine-tunes ventilation based on natural breathing patterns while compensating for any leaks, and AVAPS-AE, an auto-titrating mode that maintains a patent airway with an automatic back-up rate.


	
	Lightweight and Compact
	






The DreamStation BiPAP AVAPS is compact in design and ideal for travelling. It weighs just 1.33 kg without the humidifier and 1.98 kg with the humidifier attached. 






	
	Advanced Comfort Features

	The DreamStation BiPAP AVAPS comes with Smart Ramp, Auto On/Off, preheat and leakage compensation, ensuring smooth, personalized therapy with minimal adjustments. These features enhance comfort by aligning therapy with the patient’s natural breathing cycle.
	
	
	Heated Humidification

	This device includes an optional heated humidifier, with settings that help prevention from dryness, providing consistent moisture levels throughout the night for added comfort.
	
	
	Bluetooth Connectivity

	Integrated Bluetooth and cloud connectivity allow seamless remote monitoring, enabling healthcare providers to track therapy data and make necessary adjustments for optimal outcomes.
	
	
	Warranty 

	Philips DreamStation BiPAP AVAPS comes with 2 years warranty.
	


 What's in the box


	DreamStation BiPAP AVAPS Machine 
	6 ft, 15 mm Patient Tubing
	80W Power Supply with AC Cord
	DreamStation ASV Power Cord Clamp
	One each: reusable and disposable Filter
	Travel Bag 
	User Manual
